description: Legal document. Damaged and faded. Location: the city of פלודס or פלורס(??). Dated: Sunday, 21 Av 4813 AM = 8 August 1053 CE. Power of attorney, appointing Abū Sahl as an agent. Also mentions the names Abū ʿAlī and [... bt. ...] b. Yaʿaqov and her husband Yiṣḥaq. On verso there is a poem in Hebrew by ʿEli b. ʿAmram. AA/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
